creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
This is a new port of the MpegTV MPEG video/audio/Video CD (untested
by me) player. It's quite a good-quality, full-featured player.

It relies on a Linux library which is not included in our linux_lib
(libforms.so.0.88), which is included and installed under /compat/linux
I couldn't find a precedent for how to do this, so there may be a
better way.
